# AEP-Media / agent-evidence

> AEP-Media is an open-source Python research software component for local
> validation of time-aware media evidence bundles.

AEP-Media helps reviewers and researchers check whether a declared media
evidence package is internally complete, hash-consistent, path-safe,
time-bounded, and diagnosable.

It does not claim legal admissibility, chain of custody, non-repudiation,
trusted timestamping, real PTP proof, full MP4 PRFT parsing, real C2PA
signature verification, production deployment, or proof that an underlying
event is truthful.

## Key facts

- Repository: https://github.com/joy7758/agent-evidence
- Language: Python
- License: Apache-2.0
- Release: aep-media-v0.1.0
- Archive DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20107097
- Package: `agent_evidence`
- CLI: `agent-evidence`

## Quickstart links

- [README](README.md): project overview and installation.
- [AEP-Media docs](docs/aep-media/README.md): documentation index.
- [Mobile-video walkthrough](docs/aep-media/mobile-video-walkthrough.md):
  fresh-clone reproducibility path.
- [Adapter boundaries](docs/aep-media/adapter-boundaries.md): LinuxPTP-style,
  FFmpeg PRFT-style, and C2PA-like ingestion boundaries.
- [Agent index](docs/aep-media/agent-index.md): agent-readable paths,
  commands, expected issue codes, and review task.
- [JOSS paper](paper/paper.md): concise software paper draft.
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): contribution rules.
- [Support](SUPPORT.md): how to ask questions.

## Core commands

```bash
python -m pip install -e .
agent-evidence --help
agent-evidence run-media-evaluation --out /tmp/aep-media-evaluation
```

## Mobile-video review task

External reviewers are invited to reproduce the mobile-video-style fixture from
a fresh clone and report issues through GitHub Issues.

Useful paths:

- `docs/paper/joss/maintenance/recruitment/github_recruitment_issue_body.md`
- `docs/paper/joss/maintenance/issues/task_A_github_issue_body.md`
- `examples/media/use_cases/mobile_video_network_timing/`
- `tests/test_media_mobile_video_fixture.py`

Payment, if any, compensates review time and does not buy positive feedback,
stars, citation, authorship, endorsement, or publication outcome.
